name: San Diego Jewelry & Loan
description_short: Family-owned pawn shop in San Diego's Gaslamp Quarter specializing in fine jewelry, watches, and precious metals. Offers collateral loans and buys/sells estate pieces, diamonds, and luxury timepieces.
description_long:
San Diego Jewelry & Loan is a family-operated pawn shop established in 1992, located in the historic San Diego Jewelers Exchange building at 861 Sixth Avenue in Downtown San Diego's Gaslamp Quarter. The business has roots in the San Diego jewelry industry dating back to 1980, giving it over four decades of combined experience in jewelry appraisal and sales. The company is a member in good standing with the California Pawnbrokers Association, San Diego Pawnbrokers Association, and the International Watch Jewelry Guild (IWJG), holding California State License #3711-0921.

San Diego Jewelry & Loan offers three primary services: (1) collateral-based cash loans on fine jewelry, watches, and precious metals, (2) buying of jewelry and valuables for immediate cash payment, and (3) selling curated collections of fine jewelry and timepieces. They specifically purchase gold and diamond jewelry, estate jewelry, broken gold pieces, dental gold, sterling silver flatware, Rolex/Cartier/Patek Philippe watches, and other fine Swiss watches. The business emphasizes immediate payment and competitive appraisals for all purchases.

What distinguishes this pawn shop is its focus on high-end and specialty items rather than general merchandise. They specialize in estate pieces, custom jewelry designs, and luxury watches—targeting customers with fine jewelry and collectors rather than general pawning customers. Their membership in the International Watch Jewelry Guild and established industry connections suggest expertise in authenticated luxury timepieces. The long operating history in San Diego's jewelry district adds credibility to their valuations.

For consumers considering pawning or selling jewelry, this is a legitimate, licensed option with stated competitive pricing and immediate payment. However, like all pawn shops, customers should understand that pawn loans carry implicit interest costs and risk of losing collateral if loans aren't repaid. The limited business hours (Mon-Fri 10am-4pm, Sat 10am-3pm) and requirement to visit in person may be inconvenient for some customers.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Licensed pawn shop (CA State License #3711-0921) operating since 1992 with 40+ years combined industry experience
Members in good standing with California Pawnbrokers Association, San Diego Pawnbrokers Association, and International Watch Jewelry Guild
Specializes in high-end items including authenticated luxury watches (Rolex, Cartier, Patek Philippe) and estate jewelry
Immediate cash payment on-site for purchases—no waiting or third-party sales process
Accepts items in any condition, including broken jewelry and dental gold
Located in historic San Diego Jewelers Exchange building in established Gaslamp Quarter jewelry district
Website explicitly confirms they will buy broken gold and non-functional items
cons: Limited business hours (Mon-Fri 10am-4pm, Sat 10am-3pm, closed Sundays) requiring advance planning
In-person visit required—no online appraisals, remote transactions, or shipping options mentioned
No pricing transparency on website; customers must call or visit for competitive quotes and appraisals
Pawn loans carry implicit interest costs and risk of losing collateral if loans are not repaid on schedule
Website does not disclose loan terms, APR, repayment periods, or specific loan-to-value ratios
best_for: Sellers with high-end jewelry, estate pieces, or luxury watches seeking immediate cash and expert authentication
Customers needing short-term collateral loans on fine jewelry or watches willing to visit in person
Collectors or individuals with broken gold, dental gold, or damaged pieces who need quick liquidation
San Diego residents or visitors in the Gaslamp Quarter area who can accommodate limited business hours
diagnosis: Best for sellers of fine jewelry or luxury watches in the San Diego area who value immediate cash payment and expert authentication, or borrowers seeking collateral loans on high-end items. Primary caveat: pawn loans carry interest costs and collateral forfeiture risk if not repaid, and customers must visit in person during limited hours for appraisals and transactions.
services: Collateral-based cash loans on fine jewelry, diamonds, and luxury watches
Purchase and immediate payment for gold and diamond jewelry
Broken gold and damaged jewelry purchase
Luxury watch authentication and purchase (Rolex, Cartier, Patek Philippe, Swiss watches)
Fine jewelry and timepiece sales from curated collection
Custom jewelry design services (mentioned on website)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
